summary: Completed testing of export functionality across all 3 systems (Administrativo, Gerenciamento, RH). All export APIs and UI pages are working correctly. The new RH export module has been successfully added with 6 categories and 15 subcategories.
passed_tests: API /api/export/categories/rh - Returns 6 categories with 15 total subcategories
API /api/export/combined - Combined export works for multiple categories
UI /administrativo/exportar - Page loads with 31 export options
UI /gerenciamento/exportar - Page loads with 20 export options
UI /rh/exportar - Page loads with 15 export options (NEW)
UI RH Sidebar - 'Exportação' menu item present and navigates correctly
UI PDF Export Button - Clicking PDF button triggers download with success toast
critical_code_review_comments: Export system is well-structured with EXPORT_CATEGORIES_V2 configuration
RH module properly added with 6 categories: Funcionários, Registro de Ponto, Folha de Pagamento, Férias, EPIs, Custos de RH
category_configs in export/pdf endpoint includes all RH collections
ExportPage.jsx component properly handles module prop for different systems
RHLayout.jsx includes Exportação menu item with correct route
context_for_next_testing_agent: Export functionality tested across all 3 systems. RH export module is new and working correctly with 6 categories (Funcionários, Registro de Ponto, Folha de Pagamento, Férias, EPIs, Custos de RH) and 15 subcategories. All PDF export APIs return valid PDFs. Combined export works for multiple categories. UI pages accessible at /administrativo/exportar, /gerenciamento/exportar, /rh/exportar.
